user.title: Connect to Bose CSP
user.description: Enter the IP address and default volume limits for your processor. The integration will attempt to auto-discover your zones and sources.

select_entities.title: Select Zones and Sources
select_entities.description: Select the zones and sources you want to enable in Home Assistant.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Auto-discovery failed or could not find any zones. Please enter the configured zones and sources manually.

data.sources: Sources (comma-separated, e.g. Wireless Mic, Sonos, Aux)
